Track.title: Track
Track.description: Represents a single music track with its associated media and information that can be featured in the app.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Track entity.

title.description: The title of the music track.

artistName.description: The name of the artist performing the track.

audioUrl.description: The URL where the main audio file for the track is hosted (e.g., Firebase Storage, CDN).

imageUrl.description: The URL or local path of the album cover image.

videoUrl.description: The URL of an embedded music video for the track (e.g., YouTube, Vimeo).

linerNotes.description: Additional production notes or stories about the track.

playCount.description: Total number of times this track has been played.

creationDate.description: The date and time when this track record was created.

AppSettings.title: AppSettings
AppSettings.description: Holds global application settings, specifically which track is currently featured as the default song.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AppSettings entity. This should typically be a fixed value like 'global-settings' as there should only be one instance.

featuredTrackId.description: Reference to the Track entity that is currently designated as the default/featured song in the application. (Relationship: AppSettings 1:1 Track)

params.name: trackId
params.description: Unique identifier for a Track document.

firestore.reasoning: Standard structure for featured tracks and global settings.
